name: sdcorejs-agent
description: Orchestrated AI-assisted SDLC for Angular Portal, NestJS, and Next.js. Turns Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, and Codex into accountable engineers on your stack — clarify → spec → plan → write code → review → ship, with user-approval gates between each phase and a documented audit trail. Skills are auto-synced from `../skills/` source tree; bilingual VI/EN triggers throughout.
